case_title: HEATHER KRAFT-TREJO VS. DR. RUTH DOE-NOB HILL CAT CLINIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HEATHER KRAFT-TREJO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DR. RUTH DOE-NOE HILL CAT CLINIC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL DOE, DVM, HUSBAND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
